mode: resume — finish AP Biology Unit 8 (M14-M16) to reach 16/16
rationale: Disk state on entry: M1-M11 produced and carrying the 3-reviewer cascade (post-hoc PhD audit for M1-M9 on 2026-05-19; full cascade for M10-M11). M12-M13 produced by 2026-05-21 Slot B with full 2-round cascade. M14 folder pre-created but EMPTY (resume marker). M15, M16 do not exist.

Today's Slot B (2026-05-21T10:30:03Z) next_slot_recommendation explicitly: Slot A resume the SAME 2026-05-18 plan and generate M14 (empty folder), then M15 and M16, each through the full 2-round 3-reviewer cascade against the Unit 8 CED — completing AP Biology 16/16.
The 'do not add more AP Bio until existing are audited' block from the stale scheduled-task table is genuinely LIFTED: every existing AP Bio module carries _review_A/B/C. Verified at run start.

AP CS A and AP Psychology remain blocked for the cascade because they have NO CED reference doc (Reviewer C cannot run). AP Calc AB is complete. So AP Biology Unit 8 is the only reference-doc-backed work available this run.
reference_doc: references/ap-biology-ced.md — Unit 8 (Ecosystems and Energy Flow) section

modules_planned.title: Ecosystems and Energy Flow
cb_topics: Trophic levels (producers, primary/secondary/tertiary consumers, decomposers)
One-way energy flow vs matter cycling
10% rule (ecological efficiency)
GPP vs NPP
Ecological pyramids (energy upright; biomass/numbers can invert)
Carbon cycle
Nitrogen cycle (fixation, nitrification, assimilation, ammonification, denitrification)
modules_planned.ced_anchor: Unit 8 — Trophic Levels, Energy Flow, Ecological Pyramids, Carbon Cycle, Nitrogen Cycle sections of references/ap-biology-ced.md
modules_planned.delineation_note: Eutrophication is INTRODUCED briefly here as the human consequence of N runoff; full Gulf dead-zone case study belongs to M15. Phosphorus and water cycles belong to M15.

modules_planned.title: Ecosystems — Advanced Applications (case studies)
cb_topics: Water cycle
Phosphorus cycle (slow, no atmospheric component, often limiting)
Eutrophication and Gulf of Mexico dead zone
Biomagnification (DDT, mercury, PCBs)
Climate change, ocean acidification, coral bleaching
Habitat destruction, invasive species, overharvesting
AP productivity investigation (light/dark bottle DO method for NPP/GPP)
modules_planned.ced_anchor: Unit 8 — Water Cycle, Phosphorus Cycle, Human Impacts on Ecosystems, AP Investigation Anchor (Productivity) sections of references/ap-biology-ced.md
modules_planned.delineation_note: Builds on M14's energy-flow + carbon/nitrogen foundation. Trophic levels and the 10% rule are reused as PREREQUISITE for biomagnification, not re-taught.

modules_planned.title: AP Exam Synthesis & Review
cb_topics: AP Bio exam format (Section I: 60 MCQ / 90 min / 50%; Section II: 6 FRQ / 90 min / 50%)
FRQ structure (2 long 8-10 pt, 4 short 4 pt)
Scoring 1-5; 3+ for credit at many institutions
Six science practices
Common cross-unit AP traps (correlation vs causation, 10% rule misuse, exponential vs logistic, H-W assumptions)
Final 30-day study plan
modules_planned.ced_anchor: Unit 8 — AP Test Strategy (M16 review module) section of references/ap-biology-ced.md
modules_planned.delineation_note: Review/synthesis module — light on new factual claims, heavy on exam strategy + recapping prior-unit traps. Lower citation-checker risk.

execution_strategy: Per module: generator sub-agent -> _outline.json; then 3-reviewer cascade (A=PhD, B=adversarial student, C=citation checker) in parallel -> _review_A/B/C.json; aggregate; if >=2 minor revise once + round 2 (_review_*_v2.json); if any critical after round 2 halt to _review_failed/. Then ONE writer sub-agent per approved outline (AGENT_RECIPE contract) -> script.json + build_slides.py + slides/*.png + learning_check.json. Generators run in one parallel batch (3); reviewers run in batches of up to 6 concurrent.
stop_rule: Better to fully complete fewer modules with the cascade honored than to skip reviewers. If budget runs low, finish the modules already in-flight and leave the rest as resume markers for Slot B.
resume_protocol: Any M14/M15/M16 folder lacking the full artifact set (_outline.json, _review_A/B/C.json, script.json, build_slides.py, slides/*.png) is a resume candidate for the next slot.
